context: You are generating or enriching entries for the Spanish words collection.
Work only on the requested workflow step.
outputRequirements: Follow the active step's field rules exactly.
rules: Match the concise dictionary style of the examples.
Prefer dictionary headword forms when possible, such as verbs in the infinitive and nouns in the singular.
Omit optional fields when they add no value.

steps.title: Create Word Entries
steps.goal: Create new Spanish word entries from provided words, meanings, categories, or scenario prompts.
inputContract: The request may provide Spanish words, English meanings, categories, item lists, or a scenario.

fieldRules.description: Main study term. Usually a single word, but short useful phrases are allowed.
noun, proper-noun, verb, adjective, adverb, pronoun, determiner, preposition, conjunction, interjection, expression
Optional semantic grouping such as food, home, animals, people, city, or time.
m, f, mf, f_el. Only for nouns when relevant.

instructions: Use infinitives for verbs where appropriate.
Use singular headword forms for nouns unless the plural is the real lexical entry.
Use `f_el` for feminine nouns that take singular `el` before stressed /a/.

steps.title: Extract Headwords
steps.goal: Extract useful Spanish headwords from supplied Spanish text before later entry creation.
inputContract: The request provides Spanish text such as a sentence, passage, or short dialogue.
Return only a JSON array of useful canonical Spanish headword strings.

fieldRules.description: A useful canonical Spanish headword suitable for later entry creation.

instructions: Prefer useful headwords over exhaustive extraction.
Prefer infinitives, singular nouns, and canonical adjective forms where applicable.
Skip trivial function-word-only extraction unless intentionally requested.

prompts.details: Create entries for the provided Spanish words.
Extract useful headwords from the provided Spanish sentence before later entry creation.
Create Spanish entries from the provided English meanings.
Create Spanish entries in the provided categories.
Create Spanish entries needed for the provided scenario.
